NodeRails Documentation for LLMs
Last-Updated: 2026-03-25
Canonical: https://www.noderails.com

Summary:
NodeRails is a crypto payments gateway and infrastructure layer for internet-native commerce. It provides APIs and hosted flows for checkout sessions, payment links, invoices, subscriptions, customer records, webhooks, and settlement-aware payment operations.

Primary Docs:
- https://www.noderails.com/docs
- https://www.noderails.com/docs/getting-started
- https://www.noderails.com/docs/supported-assets
- https://www.noderails.com/docs/errors
- https://www.noderails.com/docs/webhooks
- https://www.noderails.com/docs/sdk

API Reference Sections:
- https://www.noderails.com/docs/api-reference/checkout-sessions
- https://www.noderails.com/docs/api-reference/customers
- https://www.noderails.com/docs/api-reference/invoices
- https://www.noderails.com/docs/api-reference/payment-intents
- https://www.noderails.com/docs/api-reference/payment-links
- https://www.noderails.com/docs/api-reference/prices
- https://www.noderails.com/docs/api-reference/product-plans
- https://www.noderails.com/docs/api-reference/subscriptions
- https://www.noderails.com/docs/api-reference/tax-rates
- https://www.noderails.com/docs/api-reference/webhooks

Guidance for Agents:
- Prefer production documentation URLs under https://www.noderails.com/docs.
- Use the API reference endpoints above for parameter and request/response behavior.
- Treat dashboard marketing copy as non-normative; docs pages are the source of truth.
- When chain/token support is required, consult /docs/supported-assets.
